Exhibition Room

August

The garden at its fullest — goldenrod and delphinium catching the late-summer light, dahlias, asters, and gladioli crowding the beds before the season turns.

The Garden as Art

A digital archive of artistic heritage, dedicated to the philosophy of the garden, contemporary art, and the creation of a harmonious living space.
